coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 70% for 22:48. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 0% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/2. Fresh legs lie to you — they say this is easy. By rep 3 you'll know the truth.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1: 110% for 7:12. Breathing will be labored by minute 2. That's normal.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Beginning strong. 7:12 at 110%. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First interval. Still optimistic. That'll change in about 7 minutes.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/2. 110% FTP, 85-100 rpm, Seated. Set the tone. Execute with precision.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 55% for 7:12. Then 22min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 55% × 7:12. Then 22min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 7:12 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 55% for 7:12. Then 22min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 7:12. Seated, 85-100 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 62% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 50% FTP, 85-100 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 62% through. This is your workout. Own it. 50% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 62% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
